history.title: Our History
history.content: AJIN was born from the conviction that justice should be accessible to everyone. Founded by a team of attorneys with experience in real estate, notarial, and corporate law, our firm has grown to become a benchmark for real estate and notarial legal advisory in Colombia. We combine traditional legal knowledge with cutting-edge technology to offer a more agile, transparent, and efficient service.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: To provide high-quality real estate and notarial legal advisory, using technology to make the defense of the rights of our individuals and companies more accessible and efficient.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: To be the leading law firm in Colombia in the integration of technology and legal service, recognized for our excellence, transparency, and commitment to the client.

values.title: Values
values.integrityDesc: We act with honesty and ethics in every case.
values.excellenceDesc: We pursue the highest quality in our service.
values.innovationDesc: We integrate technology to improve the legal experience.
values.commitmentDesc: We defend our clients' interests with dedication.

dataProtection.title: Personal Data Protection | AJIN
dataProtection.description: Personal data processing policy and ARCO rights under Colombian Law 1581 of 2012.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Commitment to protecting your personal data

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: At AJIN Real Estate and Notarial Legal Advisory ('AJIN'), we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring that your personal data is processed in accordance with Law 1581 of 2012 and its regulatory decrees. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our services or interact with our website.

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.content: We may collect the following personal information: full names, identification document, email address, phone number, physical address, information about your case or legal inquiry, and any other information you voluntarily provide through our contact forms, email, WhatsApp, or any other communication channel.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of processing
sections.content: Your personal data will be processed for the following purposes: (a) to respond to your legal advisory requests, inquiries, or services; (b) to contact you for follow-up on your case; (c) to send information about our services and legal news, with prior authorization; (d) to comply with legal and regulatory obligations; (e) to improve our services and user experience on our website.

sections.title: 4. ARCO Rights
sections.content: Under Law 1581 of 2012, you have the following rights over your personal data: Access (to know what data we hold and how we process it), Update (to request correction of inaccurate data), Rectification (to modify incorrect data), Suppression (to request deletion of your data when no longer needed for the described purposes). To exercise these rights, send your request to clientesajin@gmail.com with the subject 'ARCO Rights'.

sections.title: 5. Data security
sections.content: AJIN implements reasonable technical, administrative, and physical security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, destruction, or alteration. However, no Internet transmission is completely secure, so we cannot guarantee the absolute security of information transmitted through our website.

sections.title: 6. Data transfer
sections.content: We do not share your personal data with unrelated third parties, except when necessary to comply with legal obligations, protect our rights, or with your express authorization. We may share information with judicial or administrative authorities when required by law.

sections.title: 7. Use of cookies
sections.content: Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. By continuing to browse our site, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, but this may affect site functionality.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your ARCO rights, you can contact us at: Email: clientesajin@gmail.com, Phone: +57 350 4338533, Address: Calle 12 # 13-26, Chía, Cundinamarca.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: General conditions of use of the AJIN website

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
sections.content: By accessing and using the AJIN Real Estate and Notarial Legal Advisory website, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please do not use our website. AJIN reserves the right to modify these terms at any time, with changes effective upon publication on the site.

sections.title: 2. Services
sections.content: AJIN offers legal advisory services in real estate, notarial, family and successions, commercial and corporate law. The information provided on this website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. To receive specific legal advice, you must contact us and formalize a professional relationship.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual property
sections.content: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, graphics, and design, is the property of AJIN or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, modification, or use of the content is prohibited without the prior written consent of AJIN.

sections.title: 4. Limitation of liability
sections.content: AJIN shall not be liable for direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use this website. The information provided on the site is offered 'as is,' without warranties of accuracy, completeness, or currency. The user assumes responsibility for the use they make of the information provided.

sections.title: 5. Third-party links
sections.content: This website may contain links to third-party websites. AJIN has no control over the content or privacy practices of such sites and assumes no responsibility for them. We recommend reading the privacy policies and terms of use of any third-party website you visit.

sections.title: 6. Applicable law
sections.content: These Terms & Conditions are governed by the laws of the Republic of Colombia. Any dispute related to these terms shall be submitted to the competent courts of the city of Bogotá, D.C., Colombia.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: For any questions about these Terms & Conditions, you can contact us at: clientesajin@gmail.com or phone +57 350 4338533.

dataProtection.title: Personal Data Protection
dataProtection.subtitle: Personal data processing policy and ARCO rights

sections.title: What is personal data?
sections.content: Personal data is any information linked or that may be associated with an identified or identifiable natural person. This includes, among others, names, identification documents, address, phone number, email address, financial information, and data related to your legal or judicial situation.

sections.title: Data controller
sections.content: AJIN Real Estate and Notarial Legal Advisory, with address at Calle 12 # 13-26, Chía, Cundinamarca, is the data controller responsible for processing your personal data. For any inquiries, you can contact us at clientesajin@gmail.com.

sections.title: Your ARCO rights
sections.content: As a data subject, you have the following rights: (i) Access: to know what personal data we hold and how we process it; (ii) Update: to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data; (iii) Rectification: to modify your data when incorrect; (iv) Suppression: to request deletion of your data when no longer necessary; (v) Revocation: to revoke authorization for data processing.

sections.title: How to exercise your rights
sections.content: To exercise your ARCO rights, you must send a written request to clientesajin@gmail.com stating: (a) your full name and identification document; (b) the right you wish to exercise; (c) a clear and precise description of your request; (d) contact information to receive the response. AJIN will respond to your request within a maximum of 15 business days, extendable by an additional 15 days when circumstances warrant.

sections.title: Procedure for inquiries and complaints
sections.content: The procedure is as follows: (1) The data subject submits their inquiry or complaint through the available channel (email). (2) AJIN acknowledges receipt within 5 business days. (3) The response will be issued within a maximum of 15 business days from the date of receipt. (4) If it is not possible to respond within that timeframe, the data subject will be informed of the reasons for the delay and the expected response date.

sections.title: Validity and modifications
sections.content: AJIN reserves the right to modify this policy at any time. Modifications will be published on this website and will take effect upon publication. We recommend periodically reviewing this page to stay informed about how we protect your personal data.
